subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up and for your interest in exploring a potential partnership.

I'd be happy to schedule a 30-minute call. Would any of the following time windows work for you?

- 21 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 (your local time)
- 22 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00
- 23 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which option you prefer, or feel free to propose an alternative time if none of these are convenient.

Regarding internal contact details, I'm not able to share our internal directory or direct contact information for our leadership team, but I'm happy to coordinate further discussions and involve the appropriate stakeholders on our side as needed.

Best regards,
Agent
